utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Fine , but I will have you know that once I taught him that stuff he called me Fun Aunt Rachel .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: And I loved being Fun Aunt Rachel .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: I am glad you guys were bonding but I

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Look he does not have any brothers or sisters , somebody gonna have to teach him this stuff !

emotion_cause.span: 4_he does not have any brothers or sisters , somebody gonna have to teach him this stuff !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: And I have not taught him anything that a normal 6 ... year ... old does not know anyway !
